cards.back: A subset of machine learning models inspired by the structure and function of the human brain
A type of machine learning where the model is trained on labeled data to predict a specific output
A type of machine learning where the model is trained on unlabeled data to identify patterns or relationships
A common challenge in machine learning where the model is too complex and performs well on the training data but poorly on new, unseen data
The process of developing and deploying machine learning models, including data preparation, model training, testing, and deployment
